title: clematis bracteata
intro: Clematis bracteata, also known as the White Clematis or Clematis with White Flowers, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and antiseptic qualities, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Clematis bracteata include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and act as an antipyretic to reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Clematis bracteata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying the plant's leaves and flowers and then combining them with water or a solvent to create a medicinal extract.
